texto: The road to success has many paths. Do not become boggled down on what is out of your control, but be determined to push yourself to adapt to what is in your way so that you can get closer to your dreams. Be inspired in the face of adversity, gracious and humbled in the face of triumph, and fearless in the unknown.
explicacao: Citação de Jonathan Ryan Batson sobre esforço, persistência e resultados. “The road to success has many paths. Do not become boggled down on what is out of your control, bu…” articula motivacao, adversity, success em registro de motivacao, com relevância para contextos como inspiracao e viagem.
